decisions.detail: Drift corrected: 5 Shorts were stale SCHEDULED in state but verified PUBLIC via YouTube oEmbed (HTTP 200) — v2_twist(vxP6XiJKLkg, 06-05), v2_answer(TwJNypz8c4I, 06-06), v3_hook(5e8ELVo5ARg, 06-08), v3_twist(0eDPVcgODvY, 06-10), v3_answer(y3xLIfOAPHA, 06-12). Set status=PUBLIC + actual_published_at=scheduled_at for each. Cross-checked: live voidline Studio session sitting on 5e8ELVo5ARg analytics period-since_publish.

Pipeline empty: no Shorts scheduled for next 3 days (Sun 06-14, Mon 06-15, Tue 06-16). Catalogue queue is dry beyond v3_answer (06-12) — the entire v3 Tunguska batch is now published with nothing staged behind it. Cadence target is 5 Shorts/wk (Mon/Wed/Fri/Sun) so 06-14 + 06-15 slots are already unfilled. ACTION NEEDED: render+schedule next batch (v4 topic). Also: tomorrow Sun 06-14 17:00 UTC is a long-form + Reddit-seed day per cadence, but no long-form appears scheduled — verify in tomorrow's run.

Drift corrected: v1_bonus_briggs (vZ68HlWfT-Q, scheduled 2026-06-15 12:00 UTC) was still SCHEDULED in shorts_state.json but auto-published 8 days ago — verified PUBLIC via YouTube oEmbed (HTTP 200). Set status=PUBLIC + actual_published_at=2026-06-15T12:00:00Z. Catalogue is now 100% PUBLIC (11/11 Shorts live, 0 scheduled).

Studio verification via mcp_stealth.py was UNAVAILABLE this run: camoufox-stealth is not exposed through mcphub right now (tools/list returns 323 tools, none browser/stealth/camoufox — only plane/obsidian/coolify/github/protonmail/notion/etc). Could not read schedule back from Studio per the task's step-3 cross-check. Fell back to oEmbed (session-safe public/scheduled probe per LEARNINGS 2026-06-13), which was sufficient since no Shorts were scheduled for today and the only open item was the stale 06-15 entry.

PIPELINE DRY for 10+ days. Not a publish day today (Tue). Next 3 days checked: Wed 06-24 + Fri 06-26 are Shorts slots (Mon/Wed/Fri/Sun cadence) — BOTH EMPTY; nothing is scheduled in state beyond v1_bonus_briggs (06-15). No Short has published since 06-15 = 8 days of upload silence vs 2/wk recovery cadence (would expect ~2 Shorts in that window). Sun 06-21 long-form slot also appears to have been missed (no v4 long-form in state). Root cause unchanged from 06-13 DRIFT_FLAG: v4 Roanoke is in production (runs/v4-roanoke/) but blocked on Google Flow thumb generation (submit button disabled, UI redesign per LEARNINGS 2026-06-13). ACTION NEEDED: unblock Flow thumb (fresh-session retry or v3 Tunguska placeholder base per LEARNINGS backup path), then render + schedule v4 batch to refill the pipeline.
